messages.content: You are a local assistant. Return only the requested answer.
Route this request: read my invoice and explain the taxes.
{"route":"document_qa","tool":"pdf_extract","reason":"invoice tax explanation"}
You are a local assistant. Return only the requested answer.
Summarize this notice: The clinic will close early on Friday. Patients should call before visiting.
The clinic closes early on Friday. Call before visiting to confirm service availability.
Include source markers when summarizing.
Source A says GST is charged on taxable supply. Source B says the invoice total includes CGST and SGST.
GST is applied to taxable supply [source: A]. The final invoice total includes CGST and SGST components [source: B].
Return a JSON tool call.
Export the invoice rows to Excel.
{"tool":"excel_export","arguments":{"schema":"invoice_rows","format":"xlsx"}}
Repair invalid JSON and return only JSON.
{route: document_qa, confidence: .8}
{"route":"document_qa","confidence":0.8}
Explain in plain language for an elderly user.
What does subtotal mean on a receipt?
The subtotal is the amount before tax or extra fees. It is the price of the items added together.
Warn about uncertainty and human review.
Can I use this bank statement as legal proof?
This may not be enough by itself. Please verify it with the bank or a qualified legal professional before relying on it.
You are a local assistant. Return only the requested answer.
Route: the user asks to make a searchable local wiki index.
{"route":"offline_search","tool":"wiki_index","reason":"local searchable index"}
Summarize briefly.
The service invoice lists labor, parts, and VAT. Payment is due within 14 days.
The invoice charges for labor and parts, includes VAT, and asks for payment within 14 days.
Include source markers when summarizing.
Source A: Singapore GST is 9 percent. Source B: The receipt shows the GST amount separately.
Singapore GST is listed as 9 percent [source: A]. The receipt separates the GST amount from the subtotal [source: B].
Return a JSON tool call.
Preprocess this blurry receipt image.
{"tool":"image_preprocess","arguments":{"blur_reduction":true,"contrast":"auto","deskew":true}}
Repair invalid JSON and return only JSON.
{"tool":"pdf_extract", arguments:{doc:"invoice"}}
{"tool":"pdf_extract","arguments":{"doc":"invoice"}}
Explain in plain language for an elderly user.
What is VAT?
VAT is a tax added to many goods and services. The seller collects it and shows it on the invoice or receipt.
Warn about uncertainty and human review.
Does this medicine bill prove my insurance claim will be accepted?
It might support the claim, but it does not guarantee acceptance. Please verify with the insurer or a qualified human reviewer.
You are a local assistant. Return only the requested answer.
Route this: convert the extracted table to XLSX.
{"route":"excel_export","tool":"excel_export","reason":"spreadsheet output requested"}
Summarize briefly.
The bank statement shows three deposits and two withdrawals. The ending balance is higher than the starting balance.
The statement has more money added than removed, so the ending balance is higher.
Include source markers when summarizing.
Source A: Canada may charge GST or HST. Source B: Some provinces also list PST.
Canadian receipts may include GST or HST [source: A]. Some provinces also show PST as a separate tax [source: B].
Return a JSON tool call.
Read the local PDF and produce structured fields.
{"tool":"pdf_extract","arguments":{"schema":"document_extraction","local_only":true}}
Repair invalid JSON and return only JSON.
[tool: wiki_index, query: GST receipt]
{"tool":"wiki_index","arguments":{"query":"GST receipt"}}
Explain in plain language for an elderly user.
What is a masked card number?
A masked card number hides most digits. It usually shows only the last four digits so the card stays private.
Warn about uncertainty and human review.
Can this receipt prove my tax deduction?
It may help, but tax rules vary. Please verify with a qualified tax professional before using it for a deduction.
You are a local assistant. Return only the requested answer.
Route: user wants a short explanation of a VAT invoice.
{"route":"text_chat","tool":"local_text_model","reason":"plain explanation requested"}
Summarize briefly.
The Thailand receipt lists VAT, a QR payment reference, and the merchant tax ID.
The receipt shows VAT, the QR payment reference, and the merchant tax ID.
Include source markers when summarizing.
Source A: UPI references identify digital payments. Source B: The receipt amount is in INR.
The UPI reference identifies the digital payment [source: A]. The receipt amount is shown in INR [source: B].
Return a JSON tool call.
Create a PDF copy of this extracted summary.
{"tool":"pdf_export","arguments":{"source":"summary","format":"pdf"}}
Repair invalid JSON and return only JSON.
{warning: medical, review: yes}
{"warning":"medical","review":true}
Explain in plain language for an elderly user.
What does HSN mean on an Indian invoice?
HSN is a code used to classify goods for tax. It helps show which tax rate applies to the item.
Warn about uncertainty and human review.
Can you say this legal notice is definitely valid?
I cannot say that with certainty. Please have a qualified legal professional review the notice before relying on it.
You are a local assistant. Return only the requested answer.
Route: transcribe the user's local audio note.
{"route":"speech_to_text","tool":"parakeet_service","reason":"audio transcription requested"}
Summarize briefly.
The receipt is paid by masked card ending 1234. The merchant copy should not reveal full card details.
The receipt was paid with a masked card ending 1234, and the full card details should stay hidden.
Return a JSON tool call.
Run safety checks for a legal output.
{"tool":"safety_checks","arguments":{"category":"legal","require_human_review":true}}
Warn about uncertainty and human review.
Is this financial summary guaranteed correct?
No. It may contain extraction or interpretation errors. Please verify it with the original statement or a qualified human reviewer.
